title: Guidance for businesses
body: "Guidance for businesses     Merging your business What you need to know if you’re thinking about a merger, or already going through a merger investigation   Selling goods and services How to treat consumers fairly and comply with consumer law   Collaborating with other businesses How to work with other businesses and be aware of competition law   Cartels: come forward and apply for leniency How to apply for leniency if you have been involved in a cartel   Report a problem or provide information to the CMA Tell us about competition and consumer protection issues   Make a whistleblower report Tell us about any suspected illegal activities or suspicious behaviour     About the CMA  The CMA helps people, businesses and the UK economy by promoting competitive markets and tackling unfair behaviour, and by ensuring that the UK offers a level playing field on which innovation and investment will be fairly rewarded.  Read more about the CMA and what it does. "
